_comment: Compound V3 Comet corpus: hand-encoded fixtures for every COVER selector plus representative Etherscan V2 real transactions from the 2026-06-02 28-market sweep. approveThis was not observed in that sweep; Authorization typed-data remains covered by synthetic typed-data entries because it is not an onchain txlist selector.
